## Scope

What day, experiment, chapter, lab, diagram, or checklist does this change update?

## Reader Outcome

What should the reader be able to do after this change?

## Review Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and easy to review.
- [ ] New terms are added to the glossary.
- [ ] Claims are backed by examples, measurements, or citations.
- [ ] Code examples are runnable or marked as pseudocode.
- [ ] The journal/book mapping is updated in `maps/day-to-book.yml` when relevant.
- [ ] The combined site renders locally with `./scripts/build-site.sh`.
